# Target: Godot 4.3

extends Node3D
class_name GeneratedScene

func _ready():
	# === Environment ===
	var env = WorldEnvironment.new()
	env.environment = Environment.new()
	env.environment.background_mode = Environment.BG_SKY
	add_child(env)
	# Ambient light intensity: 0.4
